evidence: "I so Love this movie! An all time favorite of mine."
"This was a very real movie. I so loved watching all the toasts from the different weddings."
"If you want a movie that is extremely predictable and fakey, this isn't for you."
"It is a great family movie, date night movie, well...anytime movie."
"I am so glad that I didn't listen to the bad reviews. Too slow? I am not sure where it would have been slow."
"I think what you think of this movie depends on your tastes."
"The writing, the characters, the acting, the scenery, everything about it is absolutely perfect to me."
"The Cinematography alone is so beautiful and mesmerizing."
"I was so surprised by this movie! I wasn't sure about watching it, really."
"I love the story line. It's just to me, such a beautiful movie!"
"The acting was great, the sets were great, loved the cinematography and the story line."
"I feel like I am actually there. This place is my escape and the characters are all my eccentric but lovable friends."
"It is sad to say how well I can see that to be true."

summary: The user has a strong preference for drama and comedy films that are visually stunning and emotionally engaging. They appreciate high production quality and tend to enjoy slower-paced narratives that allow for character development and emotional depth.
